Assignment For Session 5:
4 Comparisons


1. Create your own 4 Comparisons using the formulas listed below:

2 "Heavy" Comparisons
Comparison 1:  Compare your product or service to your competition. Be as specific as possible.

(Example: Unlike (name of competition), (name of your service/product) allows you instant access to (XYZ), provides superior service by offering you free 24/7 support, and is 1/3 the price!…)

Your First Heavy Comparison

WRITE IT HERE:


Comparison 2:  Compare your viewer's life both with and without your product/service. Think of this as less of a dream story and more of a cautionary tale for not taking immediate action. 

(Example: When you pick up (name of product/service) today, not only will you have experience greater peace of mind, knowing that you've finally discovered a solution to (their number one problem), you will also begin your fast track to (list of benefits.) Or, you can keep doing what you're doing now and just "hope" things will change… Doing nothing is a sure-fire way to get nothing in return… and I know you want more out of your life than to just keep struggling with (their number one problem) year after year…)

Your Second Heavy Comparison

WRITE IT HERE:

2 "Light" Comparisons
Comparison 3:  A light-hearted and general comparison that anchors your product to something they already know.

(Example: "You know, weight loss is a lot like playing checkers…" or "You know, dating is a lot like going to Vegas…")

Your First Light Comparison:

WRITE IT HERE:


Comparison 4:  A light-hearted and tip-specific comparison that anchors your product to something they already know.

(Example:  "Think of staggering your calories in order to lose weight like playing with a yo-yo that does amazing tricks…" or "Think of making money on the Internet using (one of your 3 tips here) like investing in a stock that always goes up in value…"

Your Second Light Comparison:

WRITE IT HERE:
